task_completion.description: Verify that ProjectLibre is opened with the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Resource view is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Resources' spreadsheet view is active in ProjectLibre, displaying columns like Name, Type, Initials, etc.

task_completion.description: Verify that the resource Name, Type, and Initials are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the resource spreadsheet contains 'Helena Torres' in the Name column, 'Work' in the Type column, and 'HT' in the Initials column.

task_completion.description: Verify that the resource Group and Max Units are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The same row contains 'Engineering' in the Group column and '100%' in the Max. Units column.

task_completion.description: Verify that the resource Standard Rate and Overtime Rate are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The same row contains '110' or '110.00/hr' in the Std. Rate column and '165' or '165.00/hr' in the Ovt. Rate column.

task_completion.description: Verify that the project is being saved as a Microsoft Project XML file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog is visible with the file name 'updated_project.xml', the directory path pointing to '/home/ga/Projects', and the file type set to Microsoft Project XML.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the ProjectLibre GUI to add the resource.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ProjectLibre interface being used to enter data, rather than a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not manually edit the XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) are open showing XML code.

integrity.description: Verify that the save operation is performed through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard GUI save dialog is used to export the file, rather than terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new resource must have the following exact details: Name: 'Helena Torres', Initials: 'HT', Group: 'Engineering', Standard Rate: 110.0, Overtime Rate: 165.0. The final XML file must be exported to '/home/ga/Projects/updated_project.xml'.
